header.title: CMS Reference
header.description: Strapi CMS schema definitions, content models, and data architecture for developers.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.description: Step-by-step Strapi installation with PostgreSQL, creating your first content types, and connecting to the Next.js frontend. Full developer onboarding guide.

sections.title: Form Collections
sections.description: Strapi schema definitions for Service Requests, Contact Forms, and Quotation submissions. Copy-paste schemas with full field mappings to TypeScript interfaces.

sections.title: Content Collections
sections.description: Schemas for Articles, Tutorials, and Case Studies with rich text fields, media relations, category taxonomies, and SEO metadata. Full TypeScript interface mappings.

sections.title: Single Types
sections.description: Site-wide settings, SEO configuration, company information, and global content stored as Strapi Single Types. Schema definitions with default values.

sections.title: Shared Components
sections.description: Reusable Strapi components: Contact Info, UK Address, SEO Metadata, Social Links, and more. Compose these into any collection type or single type.

sections.title: Relationships
sections.description: Entity relationship diagrams, component composition patterns, and foreign key mappings across all content types. Architecture-level view of the data model.
